identity._comment: tenantId = Microsoft AAD tenant; adoScope = Azure DevOps API scope. Both used by `az login` / Kusto / ADO REST.

aria._comment: Generic Aria v2 bridge for richer flake context when 1es alone isn't enough.

powerapps-engineering._comment: Aria cluster for PowerApps test telemetry. Tables: testrun (one row per run), testresult (one row per individual test outcome). Discover schema with `cluster('kusto.aria.microsoft.com').database('9e3b07ee31d44eb9aba317884f5e8ad4').testrun | getschema`.

schedules.name: monitor-daemon
schedules._comment: kind=startup → fires once when the scheduler starts. Use for long-poll watchers, daemons that maintain their own loop.

schedules.name: nightly-flake-refresh
schedules._comment: kind=daily → fires at the given HH:mm in local TZ. Replace with kind=cron if you need a non-fixed window.

schedules.name: weekly-report
schedules._comment: kind=weekly → once per week. weekday + time both required.

schedules.name: monitor-poll-5m
schedules._comment: kind=interval → every N minutes. command may be a string (run via shell) or an argv array (run directly).
